name: Surface the live brain in chat — entity recall + entity<->graph bridge
deploy_note: Branch only. Muhammad deploys. No prod write happens until deploy AND (for the bridge write-back) M8_ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_WRITE=1.
status: DONE (code-complete, 48/48 static mirror green). Entity recall surfaced in context on BOTH chat paths; entity<->graph bridge wired read-only by default with an opt-in write-back. Live chat verify pending Muhammad's preview deploy (tests/BRAIN-SURFACE_LIVE_TEST.md).
what_was_built: 1. STREAM-PATH GAP-FILL: orchestrateStream() never injected entity context (the buffered orchestrate() did). Mirrored recallEntities + the bridge into the stream compose, gated to turns no deterministic packet owns (fleet/finance/eosb/company/state/notebook/graph keep their ground truth). So voice/conversational turns naming a known person/company now get cross-session entity context.

2. ENTITY <-> GRAPH BRIDGE (the headline): bridgeEntitiesToGraph() cross-references the entity store (m8_entities person/company) with the research memory graph (m8_graph_nodes). When a tracked person/company is also a graph node, its 1-hop connections are injected as an 'ENTITY <-> GRAPH LINKS' block so M8 can reason over relationships. Read-only by default.

3. OPT-IN CONVERGENCE: bridgeEntityNode() (env M8_ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_WRITE=1, OFF by default) seeds a TYPED person/company graph node from a recalled entity, so the two stores converge over time. Awaited (per Build-110 un-awaited-write lesson); embed:false to stay off the embedding budget; upsertNode dedups by (kind, norm_label) so it merges, never duplicates.

files_owned_and_changed.lib/memory-graph.js: + ENTITY_KIND_BRIDGE map, graphNodeForEntity (1 indexed lookup, no embedding), graphRelationsForEntity (entity->graph 1-hop relations line, skips research_thread anchors), bridgeEntityNode (opt-in write-back). Exported all. renderGraphPacket / buildGraphContext NOT touched (honesty-critical graph render left intact).
files_owned_and_changed.lib/entity-graph.js: Refactor: extracted _matchEntities (shared matcher) so recallEntities' formatted output is byte-identical; added bridgeEntitiesToGraph (person/company only, kill switch ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_DISABLED, lazy-requires memory-graph, awaits the opt-in write-back). Exported _matchEntities + bridgeEntitiesToGraph. Build-110's extractor (Groq) + the cron-moved extraction NOT touched.
files_owned_and_changed.lib/orchestrator.js: Two additive systemInstruction injections in the recall/context-assembly region only: (a) buffered path after the existing entity injection, gated == Longitudinal gate, logs entity_graph_bridge; (b) stream path after graphCtx, the gap-fill roster + bridge. Reflector block, reasoning-chain gate (entityCtxForChain), saveMemory call, and intent routing all UNTOUCHED.
files_owned_and_changed.tests/brain-surface-verify.ps1: 48/48 PS static mirror (host has no Node).
files_owned_and_changed.tests/BRAIN-SURFACE_LIVE_TEST.md: Live chat script for the preview deploy.

live_data_findings_2026-06-22_readonly.m8_entities: 6 rows: Terras[person], Collatz Conjecture/Bugs/Riemann Hypothesis[problem], scaffold-1/Lean[concept]. 0 company entities. (Atomic Habits/James Clear from the Build-110 report were cleaned up.)
live_data_findings_2026-06-22_readonly.m8_graph_nodes_person_company: ZERO. People currently live under the legacy generic 'entity' kind (e.g. 'Lagarias', 'number theorists'); B109 added person/company kinds to the constraint but extraction hasn't produced any yet.
live_data_findings_2026-06-22_readonly.implication: The read-only bridge has NO entity<->graph overlap to surface today (simulated lookup for 'Terras' returned 0 rows). This is correct and honest: the bridge is wired and fail-safe; it lights up as data converges. Two design responses below.
live_data_findings_2026-06-22_readonly.design_response_1: ENTITY_KIND_BRIDGE matches the legacy 'entity' kind too (person->[person,entity], company->[company,entity]) so a tracked person/company can bridge against existing legacy nodes TODAY; the write-back still creates clean TYPED nodes (kinds[0]).
live_data_findings_2026-06-22_readonly.design_response_2: The opt-in write-back is the convergence mechanism — enabling it seeds Terras as a typed person node, after which the bridge and the graph hard-route both reflect it (see live test Part C).

core_deliverable_met: YES. 'Entity recall live in context' is satisfied today by the roster (recallEntities) — now injected on BOTH paths (was buffered-only). The bridge is the enrichment on top; it is correctly wired and fail-safe, and converges as entities flow into the graph.
design_decisions: Read-only by default; the only writer (bridgeEntityNode) is OFF unless M8_ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_WRITE=1 — so deploying this branch changes ZERO writes by default. Safe to ship, opt-in to converge.
No DB schema change (person/company/entity kinds + related_to/belongs_to edges already in NODE_KINDS/EDGE_RELS via B109). STOP-and-ask gate not triggered.

Did NOT touch renderGraphPacket/buildGraphContext (honesty-critical graph narration) — bidirectional reinforcement is achieved via the write-back (entities -> typed graph nodes) which the existing graph render then surfaces, rather than by annotating the render path.
recallEntities output kept byte-identical (extracted _matchEntities) so the 3 existing callers + Build-85d reasoning chain are unaffected.

Reflections-as-quality-signal: DEFERRED on purpose. The brief marked it optional, and the Build-110 reflector block is explicitly off-limits this session; the reflector is post-answer and general/knowledge-only, so using it as a PRE-answer signal is a separate feature. Noted, not built.
not_touched: Build-110 reflector block, reasoning-chain gate, the saveMemory call, intent routing
No deploy, no merge to main, no push to main
tests: tests/brain-surface-verify.ps1 — 48/48 (PS static mirror; host has no Node). Live: tests/BRAIN-SURFACE_LIVE_TEST.md (pending preview deploy).
remaining_next: Optional: enable M8_ENTITY_GRAPH_BRIDGE_WRITE=1 to start entity->graph convergence, then watch person/company nodes accrue edges.
Future: reflections-as-quality-signal (deferred); a graph->entity annotation in renderGraphPacket if desired (deliberately skipped for honesty-render safety).

git.never: git add -A / git add .  — owned files only
git.push: feat/brain-surface (branch only; do NOT push main, do NOT merge)
